description: Triggered when the user sends an attachment.

isReply.description: Whether the user's attachment is going to be a reply to a previously sent event.

inThread.description: Whether the user's attachment is going to be included in a thread.

kind.description: The kind of attachment dialog opened. May refer to a module uploader kind.

type.description: The types of attachment sent. If multiple are being sent, use the most common type.
